idea-plugin.name: Schema Documentation Provider
idea-plugin.description: Appends @Schema(description) and @Parameter(description) from Swagger/OpenAPI annotations to the Quick Documentation popup.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.2.0
  • Added @Parameter(description, example) support for method parameters.
1.1.0
  • Schema documentation is now appended to existing Javadoc instead of being shown only when Javadoc is missing.
  • Added getter/setter/is-method support — @Schema annotations on backing fields are resolved when hovering over accessor methods.
  • Improved rendering: schema section is displayed below a horizontal separator with a bold @Schema: label.
